title: Cloaking
description: Adds a new enchantment which hides your name tag if you're wearing it on your helmet.
body:
## DESCRIPTION
The new cloaker enchanted is not a treasure enchantment or a curse.  
You can enchant a helmet with this enchantment in a level 30 enchantment table or by combining it with the cloaking book in an anvil.  
### See [here](https://fabricmc.net/wiki/install) for how to download fabric mods  
### ***Forge version may be laggy, please use fabric instead unless necessary***
###   

#### [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cloaker) is a similar datapack wich hides your nametag if you're wearing a leather helmet  
###  
  
Issues: https://github.com/MaxMasterCoder/cloaking-1.20.1/issues  
Source Code: https://github.com/MaxMasterCoder/cloaking-1.20.1  
How to play: https://github.com/MaxMasterCoder/cloaking-1.20.1#readme
##
##
##
### P.S. First time programming in forge!
